_doc.purpose: Character-continuity keyframe: same hero, arbitrary pose.
_doc.how: IP-Adapter locks the hero's identity from a reference image; ControlNet OpenPose sets the pose from a skeleton image; a fixed seed keeps takes consistent. The basis for animation keyframes (one skeleton per frame).
_doc.requires: The 'pose' feature pack (capabilities.py): ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus node + control_v11p_sd15_openpose model + ip-adapter_sd15 + CLIP-ViT-H clip_vision.
_doc.injected_by_gen_py: 4 ckpt_name; 6/7 prompt text; 42 hero image (uploaded); 44 pose skeleton image (uploaded); 5 width/height; 3 seed/steps/cfg; 41 weight (identity strength); 45 strength (pose strength).
_doc.verified: Node APIs confirmed via object_info; ran end-to-end (frost knight identity posed to an OpenPose skeleton).
